task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the survey requirements document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'survey_requirements.txt' showing the camera and survey specifications.

task_completion.description: Agent opens QGroundControl and creates a Survey mission pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl application is open in the 'Plan' view, and a 'Survey' polygon/pattern is visible on the map interface.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the custom camera specifications in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Survey settings panel shows camera parameters set to: focal length 16mm, sensor width 23.5mm, sensor height 15.6mm, and image width 6000.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the flight altitude or GSD to meet the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Survey settings panel shows the altitude set to approximately 163.4 m OR the Ground Sample Distance (GSD) set to 4.0 cm/px (0.04 m).

task_completion.description: Agent configures the frontal and side overlap percentages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Survey settings panel shows Frontal overlap set to 75% and Side overlap set to 65%.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the mission plan to the required file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or QGroundControl file menu showing the mission plan being saved as 'field_survey.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure the mission, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively clicking and typing inside the QGroundControl application window to set parameters, rather than writing a JSON/XML .plan file manually in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual map and settings panels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals of QGroundControl's map interface being manipulated (e.g., adjusting survey polygon vertices) and settings panels being actively modified.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file through the application rather than spoofing it via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final file creation should be the result of a 'Save' action within QGroundControl, not a terminal command like 'cp', 'mv', or 'echo' creating the 'field_survey.plan' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey requirements document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/survey_requirements.txt. The required camera specifications are: focal length 16 mm, sensor width 23.5 mm, sensor height 15.6 mm, and image width 6000 px. The target GSD is 0.04 m (4.0 cm/px), which corresponds to a target altitude of 163.4 m. The required frontal overlap is 75% and side overlap is 65%. The final mission plan must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/field_survey.plan.
